data.name: ParserEffectfulTypeSyntaxRemoved
data.value: Function effect requirements now use `need`: write `A -> B need Effect` instead of `A ->{Effect} -> B`.

data.name: ParserLegacyEffectSyntaxRemoved
data.value: `ability` declarations have been removed; declare a marker tag with `Name :: effect;`.

data.name: ParserEffectTagTypeParametersNotSupported
data.value: effect tags are nominal markers and cannot declare type parameters

data.name: ParserEffectTagMembersNotSupported
data.value: effect tags cannot declare operation members; use ordinary functions with a `need` clause

data.name: ParserEffectTagRequiresSemicolon
data.value: effect tag declarations must end with ';'

data.name: ParserHandlerSyntaxRemoved
data.value: `handler` and `resume` have been removed; effects are compile-time tags and cannot be handled at runtime

data.name: ParserWithClauseSyntaxRemoved
data.value: `with` effect handlers have been removed; propagate the callee's effects through the caller's `need` clause

data.name: ParserNeedClauseRequiresEffectPath
data.value: need clause requires at least one effect path

data.name: ParserNeedClauseAllowsEffectPathsOnly
data.value: need clause only accepts effect paths, not value expressions or type applications
